# Clutch Academy

> Manual transmission driving school in Toronto, Ontario. One-on-one
> lessons on real roads with founder-instructor Sam Anthony.

## Services

- **Single Lesson** — $90 CAD / hour. Best for refreshers or learners with prior experience.
- **3-Lesson Package** — $240 CAD ($30 savings). Full progression from clutch basics to road-confident driving.

## Service area

Toronto and the surrounding GTA. Lessons start in quieter areas to build confidence, then transition to real-road driving. Specific meeting location is selected at booking.

## Booking

Book online: https://calendly.com/clutchacademy-ibca

Payment is collected at booking time; all major cards accepted.

## Contact

- Phone: (437) 223-1153
- Email: hello@clutchacademy.ca
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/clutchacademy.ca/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61569269306023

## Requirements

- Students must hold a valid Ontario G2 or G driver's license.
- Lessons are conducted in a 2015 Volkswagen Golf with manual transmission.
- Wear thin-soled shoes for clutch feel; no sandals or open-toe shoes.

## What students learn

Clutch control and finding the bite point, smooth takeoffs, starts and stops, shifting through the gears at speed, hill starts, real-road driving in Toronto traffic. Most beginners feel confident after three lessons; learners with prior experience are often comfortable in 1–2.

## Cancellation

Cancellations are eligible for a full refund if made within 24 hours of booking and at least 24 hours before the scheduled lesson time. Confirm current policy at booking.

## About the instructor

Samuel Anthony — founder and lead instructor. Teaches manual step by step, at the student's pace, on real Toronto roads.

## Site

https://clutchacademy.ca/
